bird.name: Brown-backed honeyeater
bird.summary: The brown-backed honeyeater (Ramsayornis modestus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea and Cape York…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.name: 约克角半岛
locations.summary: 约克角半岛（英語：Cape York Peninsula）是澳大利亚東北部昆士兰州的一个半岛，其北端约克角是澳大利亚大陆的极北点。该半岛在1770年由英国航海家詹姆斯·库克以约克公爵的封号命名。 约克角距新几内亚岛约140公里，两地由托雷…

relations.subject: Brown-backed honeyeater
relations.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia

relations.subject: Brown-backed honeyeater
relations.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia

relations.subject: Brown-backed honeyeater
relations.evidence: It is found in a wide variety of tropical or subtropical habitats near water in coastal areas, including open grassy woodlands, swamps, rainforests, mangroves, and gardens
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
